nl_query: Which bundles have been in SCANNING status for more than 24 hours without reaching COMPLETE, and show the exam hall, bundle code, scanned count, expected count, and the device that last scanned a script in that bundle?
failed_sql:
SELECT b.id, b.bundle_code, b.exam_hall, b.scanned_count, b.expected_count, sh.device_id, sh.scanned_at
FROM   bundle b
JOIN   scan_history  sh ON sh.script_id = b.id
WHERE  b.status = 'OPEN'
  AND  sh.scanned_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '24 hours'
  AND  sh.scanned_at > b.scanned_at
  AND  b.scanned_count < b.expected_count
GROUP BY b.id, b.bundle_code, b.exam_hall, b.scanned_count, b.expected_count, sh.device_id, sh.scanned_at
ORDER BY b.scanned_count DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): bundle.scanned_at. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
